disambiguated.context: Blanca Guzman and Ebony Charles were driving to the restaurant but got into a fender bender on their way there. This resulted in a yelling match in the middle of the road. Ebony Charles got out of the car and started yelling at the other driver while Blanca Guzman sat back embarrassed.
